pr.title: RFC: A framework for deciding the n-gram question

output.summary: Study probes causal eval-time n-gram mixing with hash-collision analysis to decide if auxiliary eval state should count toward the 16MB artifact limit.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Study describes eval-time caching and rule proposals rather than val-only training.
techniques: Eval-time n-gram cache with strict causality
Rule proposals limiting aux eval state and latency
